If you had the choice, which format would you prefer Cartoon Network aired DBZ?

The way they are now; dubbed with FUNimation's music
Dubbed, but the original DBZ musical score
Sub-titled, original voices and music

Current Results

Best viewed in 800 by 600 resolution or better & thousands of colors or more.




Thursday - 10/21/1999

Mr.E @ 17:26 pst - Absolutely disgusting...
I'm watching the dub episode today "A Final Attack," and just before Freeza reaches full power, he says this to Goku: "Ok big guy, whatever turns you on." I'm sorry for the language, but FUNIMATION HAS TOTALLY FUCKED UP DBZ. Freeza is NOT a woman god damn it, and he is NOT supposed to be hitting on Goku. This is the worst dialogue I have ever heard from the dub, they are making Freeza look like he swings the wrong direction. Many people think he is the best villain of the whole series in many people's opinions, and FUNimation ruins him completely...Domo arigato...

Wednesday - 10/20/1999

Mr.E @ 21:27 pst - Fanart Update!
Sixteen more drawings have been added to our archive. Eat your heart out.

Skullmac @ 18:51 pst - DragonBall Z Stops Airing In Greece
I have been notified by our biggest Fan Review writer that DBZ has stopped airing in Greece. This includes reruns as well. Apparently they stopped translating the series as Freeza was attempting to transform for the first time. Even worse, Greek DBZ is not edited anywhere near to the extent of English DBZ. This is indeed a great loss to all DBZ fans, especially those in Greece.

Tuesday - 10/19/1999

Mr.E @ 23:40 pst - Nande? Supa Update?!
Yes, late tonight I sat down for an hour and FINALLY churned out the latest picture archive update. This latest addition nearly doubles our archive, brining the total amount of images on PN to over 400! O_o Enjoy, and surprisingly enough, there's even MORE to come!

Monday - 10/18/1999

Mr.E @ 22:53 pst - More on the HFIL Thing...
Look, I know what HFIL stands for, but it is NOT IN THE ORIGINAL VERSION! FUNimation just MADE IT UP! Stop telling me that I'm wrong, you come off sounding more clueless than you think. It is supposed to be HELL, end of story. And also, don't think that you cannot say hell in a cartoon, I've seen plenty of episodes of Ren and Stimpy/Aeon Flux to know that is a lie.

Mr.E @ 18:50 pst - Hilarious Clip!
I normally don't post in the news about updates to the humor section, but this is just too damn funny. I urge all of you to download the juice commercial and laugh your asses off. :D

Mr.E @ 17:45 pst - Goku, Super Saiyajin...
Alright, the voices were not that bad, and they handled most of the episode fairly well, but then what do I see on the demons' shirts? HFIL! What kind of crap is that? It's HELL god damn it, HELL. Does FUNimation HAVE to keep making the same mistakes over and over? Ah well, besides that, I was fairly satisfied with the episode (Although I have to say the cursing in the original really makes Goku look VERY pissed). FUNimation cut the split second where Kuririn puffs out before he explodes, but I guess FUNimation has to cut something if they want to raise the price on the uncut videos some more. And people will go out and buy the uncut version for that little snippet, when FUNimation could have left it in. Don't you just love America?

Sunday - 10/17/1999

Mr.E @ 18:23 pst - Goodbye, Goodbye...
Our good friend DeathballZ has had his site deleted by his host Enthralling, and it seems he has no will to update his site anymore. Once again another great site has left us. ;_; Lets all pay homage to our provider of the sadistic side of Dragonball, DeathballZ.





Planet Namek is just a fansite, we did NOT create Dragonball, nor did we have any part in the production process.


Dragonball, DragonballZ, and DragonballGT were produced by Toei Entertainment, Bird Studios, and Akira Toriyama. This site is not meant to infinge on any copyrights, it is simply here to encourage people to watch the Dragonball series.
